title: DTU RAVEN Seeks Collaborations and Partnerships
excerpt: DTU RAVEN is reaching out to potential partners and collaborators in the field of autonomous systems.
content:
RAVEN is ready to take on new challenges and opportunities! We are a driven, student-led team at DTU, working at the cutting edge of autonomous systems, robotics, and unmanned technologies. With expertise spanning AI, aerospace, electronics, and software, we’re tackling some of the most exciting challenges in tech today — and we're looking for partners who want to break new grounds with us.

Whether you're in a field related to autonomous tech or know of any opportunities for collaboration, sponsorship, or funding, let’s connect! Feel free to reach out to Carl Borg or email us at contact@dturaven.com. We're eager to explore how we can team up to drive real-world innovation, fuel progress, and make a tangible impact. The future of technology is ours to shape — let’s do it together!
